description_long: This object is a stylized potted flower with a cubic orange-brown planter at its base. A single, straight green stem rises vertically from the center of the planter, supporting a large, simple flower at the top. The flower has five broad, pointed purple petals arranged radially around a circular yellow center. The petals are slightly curved and overlap at their bases, giving the flower a full, symmetrical appearance. No leaves are visible along the stem or at the base. The overall design is geometric and minimal, with smooth surfaces and solid colors.
description: A stylized potted flower with a green stem, five purple petals, and a yellow center in an orange-brown cubic planter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the flower with all five petals visible and the stem centered in the planter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the petals, with the stem and planter in profile.
description_view_2: Another side view, showing the petals' overlapping edges and the stem's attachment to the planter.
description_view_3: Rear view of the flower, displaying the back of the petals and the symmetry of the arrangement.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around the central disk, with slight overlapping at the base and clear rotational symmetry.
